overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic research laboratory facility. The player character, holding a pistol, moves through high-tech rooms examining holographic biological displays and data terminals. The environment features clean white surfaces, red accent lighting, and advanced medical equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: monitoring station with dual data screens

events.description: turns away from terminal to begin moving forward

agents.ego_description: examining the dual-screen terminal displaying circular diagrams, then turning to exit the area

entered.detail: white cabinet with two large displays showing circular gauge diagrams and green data readouts
tall white storage cabinet with warning labels

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a monitoring station with dual screens displaying technical data. The player examines the terminal before turning right to exit the enclosed space into the facility.

events.description: passes through glass partition from enclosed terminal room into main laboratory space

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the glass corridor into the main laboratory area

entered.detail: transparent glass wall separating the terminal area from the main lab
large cylindrical tank with glowing red interior and metallic frame
metal counter with equipment and papers

segments.scene_description: Moving through a glass-walled corridor, the player enters the main laboratory space. A large red-lit containment tank becomes visible on the right as the player advances toward the central work area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main laboratory with holographic specimen displays

events.description: slows to examine the holographic displays on the laboratory tables

agents.ego_description: walking through the lab and examining holographic biological specimens on display tables

entered.detail: long rectangular table with glass top displaying floating holographic images
red glowing cellular structure floating above the display table
bank of screens showing data and video feeds

segments.scene_description: The player explores the main laboratory, approaching a display table with holographic biological specimens including cellular structures and brain scans. The red containment tank remains visible in the background while wall monitors show additional data.

events.description: approaches the wall terminal to examine the data screens

agents.ego_description: examining the wall-mounted terminal displaying multiple data screens and system interfaces

entered.detail: tall console with multiple touchscreen displays showing system data and red warning indicators
metal shelving unit with cylindrical containers

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the display tables, the player approaches a wall terminal with multiple data screens. The red containment tank is now visible through the glass on the left side as the player examines the terminal interface.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner analysis station with organ displays

agents.ego_description: examining holographic medical displays showing anatomical specimens in the corner workstation

entered.detail: L-shaped counter with holographic displays and file folders
rack holding manila folders and documents
floating three-dimensional hologram of a human heart with data readouts

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the player moves to a corner analysis station featuring a display table with holographic anatomical specimens including a detailed heart model. File folders and documents are visible on the counter as the player examines the medical data.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined monitoring station into an expansive, high-tech laboratory filled with holographic medical data. It begins at a dual-screen terminal displaying technical data before the camera turns right to exit the enclosed space and enter a glass-walled corridor. As the camera advances into the main laboratory, a large red-lit containment tank emerges on the right, serving as a focal point while the view shifts toward a central work area featuring holographic cellular structures and brain scans. The scene then transitions away from these displays toward a wall terminal with multiple screens, with the red containment tank now visible through the glass on the left. Finally, the camera moves to a corner analysis station, where the focus shifts to a detailed holographic heart model and scattered physical documents on a medical counter.
